title: UnitedHealth Group 2025 Results and 2026 Outlook
text: UnitedHealth Group reported full-year and fourth-quarter 2025 results and issued its 2026 outlook on January 27, 2026. Full-year 2025 revenue was $447.6 billion, up 12% year over year. Earnings from operations were $19.0 billion, net margin was 2.7%, and cash flows from operations were $19.7 billion, or 1.5 times net income. Full-year earnings were $13.23 per share and adjusted earnings were $16.35 per share. For 2026, the company guided for revenue greater than $439.0 billion, earnings from operations greater than $24.0 billion, earnings per share greater than $17.10, and adjusted earnings greater than $17.75 per share. The release is useful RAG evidence because it shows UnitedHealth Group remained very large and cash-generative, but entered 2026 with a lower revenue outlook and a need to rebuild performance after elevated medical cost trends, reimbursement pressure, cyberattack costs, restructuring, and scrutiny around parts of the business.
